name: sipi.bot
description: sipi.bot is a spend firewall for autonomous AI agents — a real-time API that returns APPROVED, BLOCKED, or FLAGGED for every payment an agent attempts, enforcing per-transaction caps, daily totals, velocity limits, and merchant rules.
disambiguatingDescription: sipi.bot is a payment-control spend firewall API for autonomous AI agents (x402 / AP2 / AgentKit) — not a SIP/VoIP telephony bot and not an AI-bot-blocking / WAF tool.

hasPart.name: sipi.bot
hasPart.description: The spend firewall for autonomous AI agents — approve, block, or flag every transaction before a dollar moves.

subjectOf.name: sipi.bot QA Feed
subjectOf.description: JSON-lines feed of structured Q&A content for AI consumption.
